notes: Combined data/source enrichment following v4.3.179: adds strong edible-use and safety/prep source support for selected food-valid mushroom records.
Adds Tom Volk / UW-La Crosse support to chicken-of-the-woods for proper cooking, raw-use stomach-upset risk, young/tender portion quality, and Laetiporus species/host distinctions.
Adds Missouri Department of Conservation support to hen-of-the-woods for choice edible status, fresh/tender portion selection, cooking guidance, first-serving caution, and lookalike comparisons.
Adds Missouri Department of Conservation support to old-man-of-the-woods for young/fresh edible-use framing while retaining Strobilomyces species-complex caution and needs-review posture.
Leaves cauliflower-mushroom source debt unchanged pending a stronger North American Sparassis edible/prep/cleaning source; does not promote mild Tylopilus records; no route/classifier code changed.
